summary: Phase 5 Testing Complete - Bank Statement Upload & Parsing. Backend: 12/13 tests passed (1 cleanup test failed due to API response format). All core bank statement features verified: CSV/PDF/Excel upload, perspective reversal, auto-categorization, journal entry creation, duplicate detection, bank account auto-creation. Frontend: Banking tab UI verified with Import Bank Statement section, supported formats (PDF, CSV, Excel), upload button, and supported banks list.

minor.issue: Returns list instead of object with 'transactions' key - may need format standardization

frontend_issues.notes: Banking tab UI properly implemented with Import Bank Statement section, format badges (PDF, CSV, Excel), green upload button, and supported banks list. UI looks clean and well-organized.

critical_code_review_comments: Bank statement parsing logic in /app/backend/routes/bank_statements.py is well-implemented with comprehensive date/amount format handling
Perspective reversal (bank credit -> income, bank debit -> expense) correctly implemented
Auto-categorization based on description keywords working (ZOMATO -> Food & Dining, IRCTC -> Travel)
Journal entry auto-creation with proper double-entry accounting
Duplicate detection works correctly by checking date, amount, and description prefix
Frontend Banking tab has all required UI elements including upload button, format badges, and supported banks
seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with TEST_ was created during testing. Cleanup tests executed to remove test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 bank statement upload feature fully tested. Endpoints verified: POST /api/bank-statements/upload (accepts PDF/CSV/Excel), GET /api/bank-statements/history. CSV parsing with column detection works. Perspective reversal verified (bank credit = user income, bank debit = user expense). Auto-categorization based on keywords (ZOMATO, IRCTC, AMAZON, etc.) working. Journal entries auto-created for each imported transaction. Frontend Banking tab in Settings accessible at /settings with Banking tab selected.

bank_statement_upload: POST /api/bank-statements/upload - Error handling for unsupported formats (returns 400)
POST /api/bank-statements/upload - Error handling for empty CSV (returns 422)
bank_statement_history: GET /api/bank-statements/history - Returns import history with account_name, transaction_count, total_amount, date_range
related_apis: GET /api/transactions - Used to verify imported transactions
GET /api/journal - Used to verify auto-created journal entries

features_verified.csv_upload: SUCCESS - 7 transactions parsed from test CSV
features_verified.perspective_reversal: SUCCESS - Bank credit becomes user income, bank debit becomes user expense
features_verified.auto_categorization: SUCCESS - ZOMATO -> Food & Dining, IRCTC -> Travel, AMAZON -> Shopping
features_verified.journal_entry_creation: SUCCESS - Journal entries auto-created for imported transactions
features_verified.duplicate_detection: SUCCESS - Re-uploading same statement skips duplicates
features_verified.bank_account_auto_creation: SUCCESS - New bank account auto-created if not exists
features_verified.frontend_ui: SUCCESS - Banking tab with Import Bank Statement section, upload button, format badges visible
